case_title: AGUSTINA CORNEJO VS. FERNANDO CABRERA GUZMAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORNEJO, AGUSTINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUZMAN, FERNANDO CABRERA THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH ANY CONTRIBITORY FAULT OF DEFENDANT GUZMAN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,660.00 FILED BY CORNEJO, AGUSTINA AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, FERNANDO CABRERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0) SERVED NOV-26-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, FERNANDO CABRERA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
